positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial botanical pattern featuring blooming bioluminescent flora and floating lunar orbs. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly detailed, designed as a seamless repeating motif for apparel. Style: Highly refined digital illustration mixed with Art Nouveau elements, high contrast silhouette work, deep indigo and emerald green color palette with accents of luminous gold and soft violet. The main subject is a complex wreath of glowing vines and exotic, idealized flowers, outlined in clean, thick lines, against a subtle, deep gradient background. Art deco meets mystical watercolor ink wash. Extremely clean lines, vibrant saturation, scalable vector look, highly detailed, isolated design for screen printing.
